<!-- What changed and why (1–3 sentences) -->

## Related Work
<!-- Task/issue ID (if any) -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] feat: new feature (MINOR bump)
- [ ] fix: bug fix (PATCH bump)
- [ ] chore/refactor/docs: no version change
- [ ] BREAKING CHANGE: incompatible change (MAJOR bump)

## Checklist
- [ ] Markdown renders correctly (no broken fences, lists, or headings)
- [ ] Spec logic is consistent (no contradictory rules)
- [ ] `tools/validate_spec.py` passes (if applicable)
- [ ] No secrets or hardcoded config values
- [ ] ADR created or referenced if this is a durable decision
